positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical illustration of bioluminescent celestial flora growing within an ancient, overgrown temple ruins. The scene depicts intertwining vines patterned like galactic arms, interspersed with glowing, crystalline flowers that mimic nebulae clusters. Use a deep color palette dominated by midnight blue, ethereal teal, glowing magenta, and luminous gold accents. The style should be a blend of ornate, neo-Art Nouveau etching and vibrant cosmic watercolor, featuring sharp silhouettes and strong central focus. Perfect for a clean, central print on fabric. Minimalist black background contrast.
negative: text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, low detail, blur, grain, artifacts, deformed, mutated, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, tiling
